raw.subject: Your Wilmington page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

The photos of your colorful truck driving around Wilmington's neighborhoods really stand out. I can tell you put a lot of heart into serving the community with unique ice cream flavors.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet. As a mobile business, it might be tough to manage bookings and calls without a central hub for customers to find you.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea that incorporates your Facebook photos and posts. The idea includes a menu hero section showcasing your flavors, a hours block so customers know when to catch you, a photo gallery to share your fun moments, and a map & directions section to help people track you down.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/port-city-pops-ice-cream-truck-wilmington

Building it out is a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in getting a quote, I'd be happy to discuss the details over a quick call or reply to this email.
